title: Bootstrap the project (monorepo + skeleton)
description: Initialize Nx monorepo, scaffold backend NestJS monolith app, scaffold frontend app, configure shared tooling (ESLint, Jest, TypeScript, Docker Compose for local infra).

title: Select technology stack
description: Choose and document the technology stack for frontend (framework, state mgmt, rich text editor, map renderer) and backend (ORM, database, realtime, image gen API). Produce a decision record.

title: Design high-level architecture (frontend + backend)
description: Document the modular monolith architecture for both backend (NestJS) and frontend. Define bounded contexts, module boundaries, communication patterns, data ownership, and real-time strategy.

title: Document system scope and bounded contexts
description: Create docs/ folder structure and write high-level scope document covering all bounded contexts: Wiki, Characters, Maps, Live Gaming, AI Assistant. Include features per context and cross-cutting concerns.
